code:
export class CorporationRanksParser{constructor(){this._corporationId=-1;this._ranks=[];}flush(){this._corporationId=-1;this._ranks=[];return true;}/**
* Field order (must match server composer):
* 1) corporationId (int)
* 2) count (int)
* For each rank:
* 3) rankId (int)
* 4) rankName (string)
* 5) rankOrder (int)
* 6) pay (int)
* 7) uniform (string)
* 8) isPolice (bool)
* 9) isParamedic (bool)
* 10) isSupervisor (bool)
* 11) isManager (bool)
* 12) isHospital (bool)
* 13) isArmory (bool)
*/parse(wrapper){this._corporationId=wrapper.readInt();const total=wrapper.readInt();const list=new Array(total);for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const rankId=wrapper.readInt();const rankName=wrapper.readString();const rankOrder=wrapper.readInt();const pay=wrapper.readInt();const uniform=wrapper.readString();const isPolice=wrapper.readBoolean();const isParamedic=wrapper.readBoolean();const isSupervisor=wrapper.readBoolean();const isManager=wrapper.readBoolean();const isHospital=wrapper.readBoolean();const isArmory=wrapper.readBoolean();list[i]={rankId,rankName,rankOrder,pay,uniform,isPolice,isParamedic,isSupervisor,isManager,isHospital,isArmory};}this._ranks=list;return true;}// Getters
get corporationId(){return this._corporationId;}get ranks(){return this._ranks;}// Optional helpers
get hasData(){return this._corporationId>-1;}get ranksByOrderDesc(){return[...this._ranks].sort((a,b)=>b.rankOrder-a.rankOrder);}}
